changes: Moved the React/Vite dashboard from src/ui/app to apps/dashboard.
Moved shared dashboard payload types from src/ui/app/types.ts to packages/ui-contract/src/dashboard.ts.
Moved smoke-tested browser-safe formatting helpers from src/ui/app/lib/format.ts to packages/ui-contract/src/format.ts.
Updated apps/dashboard imports and tests/smoke.ts to consume @decomp-orchestrator/ui-contract.
Updated root ui:build, ui:watch, and ui:check scripts to apps/dashboard paths.
Updated the dashboard Vite build output to apps/dashboard/dist.
Updated src/ui/server.ts static serving to look for apps/dashboard/dist while leaving the server itself in place for the dashboard-server phase.
Removed stale ignored src/ui/static generated output after confirming it had no tracked files.
notable_adjustments: Changed apps/dashboard/index.html script entry from ./main.tsx to /src/main.tsx after the move.
Adjusted the DetailsRail details wrapper from defaultOpen to a small state-backed open prop because the current React DOM types do not expose defaultOpen for details.

commands.summary: First post-move check exposed the DetailsRail defaultOpen type mismatch.
Dashboard app typecheck passed from apps/dashboard after import and DetailsRail fixes.
First post-move build failed because index.html still referenced ./main.tsx.
Vite production build passed and wrote apps/dashboard/dist.
First root check failed because TypeScript needed workspace package paths for @decomp-orchestrator/ui-contract.
Root check passed after tsconfig.base.json gained workspace package path aliases.
Root smoke passed after tests/smoke.ts imported @decomp-orchestrator/ui-contract.

remaining_old_ui_hits: docs/20-implementation/ui/00-overview.md describes the old src/ui/static path and should be updated in docs_and_cleanup.
objective artifacts preserve historical baseline/migration-map src/ui/app and src/ui/static references.
